Profile · 关于

CHIA GUO

郭润家

Producer, 1st AD & Director based in Shanghai.
In-house at Radical Media — North America's leading production company.

Full-pipeline producer: development, budgeting, on-set execution, post & delivery. Former creative trainee at Dentsu Z (report to CEO). Independent director with festival selections across Europe and Asia. 3 years building cross-border crews across Europe, Southeast Asia & China.

毕业于中国传媒大学，现就职于北美制作公司 Radical Media 上海办公室，担任制片人及第一副导演。具备项目全链路执行能力，曾任职电通 Dentsu Z 创意管培（汇报至CEO）。独立导演，作品入围多项国际电影节。
